description: Worry no longer about managing money, cards, mobile phone and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish mobile pouch from baggit. This timeless piece is on the top of our wishlist this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece without a bag. Dimensions: 17 cm x 16 cm Created from tough fabric Bow detail on the front A zippered pocket on the front and back One main zippered compartment Care Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
